name: Old Fashioned Sugar Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon pure extract (vanilla or lemon, or combo)
Coarse sugar for decorating (colored or plain)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Cream butter and sugar until smooth.
3. Add egg, then blend in cream and extract.
4. Gradually combine dry ingredients and mix until well blended.
5. Shape dough into a flattened ball and wrap in parchment.
6. Chill at least 1/2 hour.
7. Roll out on lightly floured board until about 1/4 inch thick.
8. Cut into desired shapes using cookie cutters.
9. Sprinkle with coarse sugar and place on parchment-covered baking sheet, about 2 inches apart.
10. Bake until golden brown.
Yield: 4 dozen Sugar Cookies
